message.content:
@startuml
title UML Sequence Diagram

actor SuperUser as SuperUser1
actor SuperUser as SuperUser2

participant Browser as Browser
participant Server as Server
database Database as Database

note right of SuperUser1
Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten
@endnote

SuperUser1 -> Browser : navigate to profile
Browser -> Server : loadAllUsers()
Server -> Database : fetch
Database -> Server : return
Server -> Browser : return
Browser -> Browser : display

SuperUser2 -> Browser : enable/disable user
Browser -> Server : changeStatus(user)
Server -> Database : save
Database -> Server : return
Server -> Browser : return
Browser -> Browser : display

@enduml
